name: Tagara
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata, Kapha, and Pitta.
mainMedicinalUses: Effective natural treatment for Insomnia and sleep apnea.
Calms nervous anxiety and panic attacks.
preparationMethods: Root powder taken with warm water at bedtime.
safetyProfile: Safe for short-term; long-term use can cause mild dizziness.
